subject: No signal since morning
description: Customer is getting no signal since 7 AM. Phone shows 'No Service'. Restarting phone did not help. Neighbours also facing the same issue.

subject: Calls dropping every few minutes
description: Customer reports calls getting cut after 1-2 minutes of talking. Issue started 2 days ago. Happens with all numbers dialled.

subject: Internet very slow after recharge
description: Customer recharged with Rs. 299 plan but internet speed is very slow. Videos keep buffering. Balance shows data available.

subject: No internet in basement office
description: Customer working in a basement office gets no mobile internet. Signal shows 1 bar only. Wi-Fi also unavailable.

subject: Network keeps switching between 4G and 2G
description: Customer reports network constantly switching between 4G and 2G. Internet disconnects every few minutes. Very frustrating during work calls.

subject: Outgoing calls not connecting
description: Customer unable to make outgoing calls. Gets busy tone immediately even though balance is available. Incoming calls work fine.

subject: WhatsApp calls breaking badly
description: Customer says WhatsApp calls are very choppy and breaking. Normal calls are fine. Data balance is available. Problem started 3 days ago.

subject: Fiber internet down since last night
description: Customer subscribed to fiber plan. Internet went down at 11 PM last night. Router internet light is red. Neighbours also affected.

subject: Mobile data not working after phone change
description: Customer bought a new Samsung phone and inserted existing SIM. Calls work but mobile internet not working. Old phone worked fine with same SIM.

subject: Signal problem near highway
description: Customer travelling frequently on NH-44 reports complete signal loss for 30 km stretch. Very inconvenient for work calls during daily commute.

subject: Complete network outage in our area
description: Customer reporting complete network outage. No calls, no internet. Multiple neighbours also affected. Issue since 6 AM today.

subject: No service for past 6 hours
description: Customer has no network service for last 6 hours. Phone shows emergency calls only. Tried restarting multiple times. SIM works in another phone.

subject: Internet outage affecting entire apartment
description: Customer says all 50+ flats in the apartment have no fiber internet since yesterday morning. Router lights are off.

subject: Planned maintenance not completed on time
description: Customer received SMS about maintenance from 2 AM to 5 AM but service has still not restored at 9 AM. Work from home severely affected.

subject: Network down after heavy rain in Chennai
description: Customer reporting complete network down since last evening after heavy rains. Surrounding area also affected. Urgent — elderly parent needs to be reachable.

subject: All services down in office area
description: Customer says all telecom services are down in the entire tech park area. Hundreds of employees affected. Escalation needed.

subject: 4G network unavailable showing only E/EDGE
description: Customer says phone showing only EDGE network since yesterday. Was getting 4G before. No physical changes made to phone.

subject: Internet disconnects every 30 minutes
description: Customer reports fiber internet disconnecting every 30 minutes exactly. Router restarts automatically. Problem started after last week's maintenance.

subject: VoLTE calls not working after SIM upgrade
description: Customer upgraded from 3G SIM to 4G SIM. Now VoLTE HD calls option has disappeared and call quality is very poor compared to before.

subject: Network outage affecting hospital area
description: Customer raising ticket on behalf of a nursing home. All staff mobile networks are down. Critical communication being affected. Urgent resolution needed.

subject: Router not working after power cut
description: Customer says fiber router stopped working after a power cut last night. Internet light stays red even after restarting. Router is 6 months old.

subject: Set top box showing no signal
description: Customer says the set top box installed by company is showing 'No Signal' error since morning. Checked all cables — all properly connected.

subject: Modem making beeping sounds
description: Customer reports the fiber modem is making continuous beeping sounds since yesterday. Internet works intermittently. Worried about fire risk.

subject: ONT box light blinking red constantly
description: Customer says the white ONT box installed at home has a red blinking light and no internet. Was working fine until this morning.

subject: Router given during installation is faulty
description: Customer got fiber installed 2 days ago but router is not giving Wi-Fi signal beyond 5 feet. Technician said it is fine but it clearly has a weak antenna.

subject: SIM card not detected in phone
description: Customer says SIM card suddenly stopped being detected. Tried removing and reinserting. Same SIM works in another phone. Phone is OnePlus 10.

subject: SIM card physically damaged
description: Customer reports SIM card got damaged when phone fell in water. Needs urgent SIM replacement with same number. Has important calls expected today.

subject: Broadband cable cut by construction work
description: Customer says OFC cable outside their building was cut during road construction. No internet since yesterday. Construction is by BBMP.

subject: Company-installed device stopped working
description: Customer says the CPE device installed on the terrace for internet has stopped working. Blinking amber light. No internet since 3 days. Multiple complaint calls made with no resolution.

subject: Power fluctuation damaged modem
description: Customer says modem was damaged due to power fluctuation during a storm. Needs replacement. Wants to know if it is covered under warranty.

subject: Charged twice for same recharge
description: Customer recharged for Rs. 399 via Google Pay. Amount was deducted twice from bank account but recharge reflected only once. Transaction IDs shared.

subject: Bill higher than plan amount
description: Customer on Rs. 499 postpaid plan received a bill of Rs. 1,240. Did not make any international calls or activate any add-ons. Requesting detailed bill.

subject: Recharge amount deducted but not credited
description: Customer recharged for Rs. 199 via PhonePe. Money deducted from account 3 hours ago but balance not updated. Transaction shows success on PhonePe app.

subject: Unknown add-on pack activated without consent
description: Customer noticed Rs. 49 deducted for 'Gaming Pack' which they never activated. Wants immediate refund and deactivation of all unwanted packs.

subject: Late payment fee charged unfairly
description: Customer says they paid the bill on the due date but a late fee of Rs. 100 was charged. Has a screenshot of the payment receipt. First time this has happened.

subject: GST invoice not received for 3 months
description: Customer requires GST invoice for telecom expenses for last 3 months. Cannot file GST returns without it. Postpaid plan Rs. 999.

subject: Postpaid plan changed without permission
description: Customer noticed their Rs. 499 plan was changed to Rs. 599 plan without their knowledge. Bill increased and features changed. Requesting immediate revert.

subject: Refund not received after plan cancellation
description: Customer cancelled an add-on pack worth Rs. 149 on 1st of the month. Was told refund in 7 days. 20 days passed, no refund received.

subject: Auto-pay deducted extra amount
description: Customer enrolled in auto-pay for Rs. 349 per month. This month Rs. 698 was deducted automatically. No explanation in bill. Wants immediate refund.

subject: Recharge not working from third party app
description: Customer says recharge done from Paytm for Rs. 249 failed but money was deducted. Paytm shows transaction pending. Needs clarification on whether recharge went through.

subject: SIM blocked after wrong PIN entry
description: Customer entered wrong PIN 3 times and SIM is now blocked. Does not know PUK code. Needs urgent assistance as it is their only phone.

subject: New SIM not activated after 24 hours
description: Customer bought a new SIM from authorised store yesterday. Submitted Aadhaar and photo. SIM still not activated after 24 hours. Store says everything submitted correctly.

subject: SIM swap done but services not working
description: Customer visited store and did SIM swap. Old SIM deactivated. New SIM inserted but showing 'SIM not provisioned' error. Urgent as customer is travelling tomorrow.

subject: Duplicate SIM requested after phone theft
description: Customer had phone stolen. Has police FIR copy. Needs urgent duplicate SIM on same number to be issued. Requests call diversion to alternate number meanwhile.

subject: SIM works for calls but not data
description: Customer says SIM card works for calls and SMS but mobile data does not work at all. Tried in two different phones. Same result. Data plan active.

subject: SIM showing registered on network but no service
description: Customer says SIM shows 'Registered on Network' but cannot make calls or use internet. Tried airplane mode trick multiple times.

subject: Want to upgrade from 3G SIM to 4G SIM
description: Customer wants to upgrade existing 3G SIM to 4G SIM to access faster internet. Not sure of the process or whether they need to visit store or can do it online.

subject: SIM card not working after getting wet
description: Customer says phone fell into water. After drying, phone works but SIM not detected. Same SIM does not work in another phone either. Needs replacement.

subject: Porting request stuck for 10 days
description: Customer trying to port number from another operator. Submitted all documents 10 days ago. Porting still not completed. Receiving conflicting information from customer care.

subject: SIM giving network but calls have echo
description: Customer says all calls have a bad echo — they can hear their own voice. Issue on all calls. SIM is 4G. Phone is Samsung Galaxy A54.

subject: Roaming not working in Dubai
description: Customer travelled to Dubai for business. Activated roaming pack before leaving. Phone shows no network after landing. Tried turning off and on. Roaming pack shows active in app.

subject: Very high roaming bill charged
description: Customer returned from Singapore trip. Had roaming pack activated. Still received a bill of Rs. 8,500 extra charges. Pack was supposed to cover calls and data. Requesting detailed breakdown.

subject: Roaming pack not reflecting after activation
description: Customer activated international roaming pack for USA trip via app. Confirmation SMS received. But app still shows roaming pack not active. Travelling in 6 hours.

subject: Incoming calls not working abroad
description: Customer on roaming says they can make outgoing calls but cannot receive incoming calls at all. Callers get a 'not reachable' message. Data and SMS working fine.

subject: How to activate roaming for Nepal trip
description: Customer travelling to Nepal next week for the first time and wants to understand roaming packs, charges, and how to activate. Not sure if Nepal is covered under standard roaming plans.

subject: Roaming data very slow in USA
description: Customer on roaming in USA says mobile internet is working but speed is extremely slow — cannot even load WhatsApp messages. Roaming data pack shows 2GB remaining.

subject: Roaming charges even after returning to India
description: Customer returned from UAE trip 3 days ago. Still being charged roaming rates in India. Called to deactivate roaming but charges continue. Raising formal complaint.

subject: SMS not delivered while roaming in Malaysia
description: Customer on business trip. Sending SMS to Indian numbers but none delivered. Calls and data working fine. SMS always worked before on previous trips.

subject: Roaming pack expired before trip ended
description: Customer on a 10-day trip bought 7-day roaming pack. Pack expired but trip continues. Wants to know how to extend roaming or buy new pack from abroad.

subject: No network in specific country
description: Customer travelling to Sri Lanka says there is no network at all. India number shows 'No Service'. Not sure if Sri Lanka is covered in their roaming plan.

subject: JioTV not loading on fiber connection
description: Customer subscribed to fiber plan with JioTV OTT benefit. App not loading any channels. Internet works fine for browsing. JioTV worked earlier. App reinstalled but no change.

subject: SonyLIV buffering continuously
description: Customer on Rs. 599 fiber plan with OTT benefits. SonyLIV videos buffer every 30 seconds even at lowest quality. YouTube works fine. Speed test shows 80 Mbps.

subject: Hotstar subscription not activating
description: Customer recharged with plan that includes Disney+ Hotstar. Shows 'Your plan does not include Hotstar' when trying to activate. Plan details clearly show OTT benefit.

subject: Netflix working slow only after 9 PM
description: Customer on fiber plan says Netflix is very slow every evening after 9 PM but works perfectly in daytime. Speed test shows good speed even at night. Only Netflix affected.

subject: OTT subscription not transferred after plan change
description: Customer changed postpaid plan from Rs. 499 to Rs. 799. Old plan had Amazon Prime. New plan also claims Prime benefit but subscription not reflecting in Amazon app.

subject: Zee5 login not working with mobile number
description: Customer cannot log into Zee5 which is bundled with their plan. OTP not received for Zee5 login. SMS OTPs for other apps working fine.

subject: YouTube quality stuck at 480p on fast connection
description: Customer has 200 Mbps fiber plan. YouTube videos automatically capped at 480p. Manually selecting HD gives buffering. Other streaming apps work in full HD fine.

subject: MX Player ad-free not working despite plan
description: Customer on a plan that includes MX Player ad-free. Still getting ads every 5 minutes. Customer care earlier confirmed the benefit should be active.

subject: OTT benefits expired before plan end date
description: Customer says their OTT subscription bundled with recharge expired 10 days before the plan end date. Recharge validity shows 84 days but OTT expired at 74 days.

subject: Cannot log in to Voot select despite subscription
description: Customer has plan with Voot Select benefit. Voot app says subscription not found when logging in with mobile number. Account not linked properly.

subject: Wi-Fi calling not available in phone settings
description: Customer says Wi-Fi calling option is not visible in their phone settings. Phone is Xiaomi Redmi Note 12. SIM is 4G. Customer works from home and needs this urgently.

subject: Wi-Fi calling disconnects when switching to 4G
description: Customer says Wi-Fi call disconnects every time they move away from home and phone switches to 4G network. Very inconvenient during long business calls.

subject: Cannot enable VoLTE on new phone
description: Customer bought Apple iPhone 14. Cannot find option to enable VoLTE. Calls are connecting via 3G fallback. Call quality very poor compared to previous phone.

subject: Wi-Fi calling showing error 403
description: Customer enabled Wi-Fi calling but gets 'Error 403' when trying to make a call. Normal cellular calls work fine. Wi-Fi internet working at 150 Mbps.

subject: VoLTE suddenly stopped working
description: Customer says HD VoLTE calls were working fine for months. Since last week VoLTE icon disappeared and call quality degraded. No changes made to phone.

subject: SMS OTP not receiving for bank transactions
description: Customer says SMS OTPs from banks (SBI, HDFC) not being received for the past 2 days. Other promotional SMSes are coming. DND settings not changed.

subject: Bulk SMS spam from unknown numbers
description: Customer receiving 30-40 promotional SMS messages daily from unknown numbers despite being registered on DND. Wants these stopped immediately and to complain formally.

subject: SMS not delivered to contacts abroad
description: Customer says SMS sent to family members in USA not getting delivered. Has international SMS pack. WhatsApp messages to same numbers delivered fine.

subject: Number portability rejection without reason
description: Customer applied for MNP (Mobile Number Portability) to switch operators. Application was rejected without any reason given. Has been using number for 8 years.

subject: Data usage showing higher than actual
description: Customer on 2GB per day plan. App shows 2GB used by 10 AM daily but customer uses phone mostly for WhatsApp and light browsing. Suspects incorrect tracking.

subject: Night data pack not activating
description: Customer recharged night data unlimited pack (12 AM to 6 AM). Pack active but data speed is throttled even during night hours. Recharge amount deducted.

subject: Prepaid balance deducted without any usage
description: Customer says Rs. 30 was deducted from prepaid balance overnight. Phone was switched off. No calls or data usage. Requesting refund and explanation.

subject: Unable to recharge from official app
description: Customer says the company's official app crashes every time they try to recharge. Tried on both Android phone and tablet. Has to use third-party apps which are less convenient.

subject: Corporate plan disconnected without notice
description: Customer says their corporate postpaid connection was disconnected without prior notice. Company has paid all dues. 50 employee connections all disconnected. Urgent restoration needed.

subject: Wrongly migrated from postpaid to prepaid
description: Customer says their postpaid account was migrated to prepaid without their consent. Lost all postpaid benefits and accumulated loyalty points. Requesting immediate revert.

subject: Caller tune activated without permission
description: Customer says a caller tune was activated on their number and Rs. 30 charged monthly. Never subscribed to this service. Requesting deactivation and refund of 3 months.

subject: Mobile number not reachable to family
description: Customer says their number is not reachable to any callers. They can make outgoing calls and use internet. Incoming calls go directly to 'not reachable'. Problem since 4 days.

subject: Call waiting and forwarding not working
description: Customer says call waiting feature stopped working. When on a call, second callers get engaged tone instead of waiting. Feature was working fine before. Rs. 199 plan.

subject: Video call quality very poor on 4G
description: Customer says video calls on Google Meet and Zoom are very poor quality on 4G. Audio cuts out frequently. Normal calls are fine. Speed test shows 25 Mbps.

subject: Unable to receive calls from landlines
description: Customer says calls from landline numbers are not connecting to their mobile. Mobile to mobile calls work perfectly. Issue specifically with BSNL landline callers.

subject: Emergency call only showing on SIM
description: Customer's phone shows 'Emergency calls only' on their primary SIM. Secondary SIM works fine. SIM 1 is a postpaid connection with valid plan.

subject: Hotspot not working from phone
description: Customer says mobile hotspot from their phone is not working after latest software update. Other devices can see the hotspot network but cannot connect. Shows 'Authentication error'.

subject: Data rollover not credited after recharge
description: Customer on plan that offers data rollover. Unused data from last month not carried over after recharging. Plan clearly mentions rollover benefit. 1.5 GB was remaining.

subject: International calls not connected from India
description: Customer wants to call their child studying in Canada. Dialled with country code +1 but call not connecting. Balance shows Rs. 250. ISD calls were working 2 weeks ago.

subject: App-based recharge history not showing
description: Customer says last 6 months of recharge history disappeared from the official app. Needed for expense reimbursement from employer. Requests history to be emailed.

subject: Student SIM plan features not activated
description: Customer bought a student SIM plan from college campus. Plan includes extra data and discount on calls but none of the benefits showing in app. SIM 3 days old.

subject: SIM not working after Aadhaar e-KYC failure
description: Customer completed e-KYC via Aadhaar OTP for new SIM. OTP received and entered but system shows KYC failed. SIM still inactive. Store says retry after 24 hours but problem persists.

subject: Balance deducted after calling toll free number
description: Customer called a toll-free 1800 number for HDFC bank. Rs. 2.50 deducted from prepaid balance. Toll-free numbers should not be charged. Requesting refund.

subject: Fiber plan speed downgraded without intimation
description: Customer subscribed to 200 Mbps fiber plan paying Rs. 999 per month. Speed test consistently shows only 50 Mbps for last 2 weeks. No intimation received about downgrade.

subject: Cannot make calls during IPL match hours
description: Customer says every evening during IPL match timings between 7 PM to 11 PM, calls completely fail to connect. Internet also very slow. Problem only during those hours.
